svg.title: NEST.02 skill cascade map
svg.desc: 28 NEST skills arranged by session phase (ARMS) with meta-dates as apex trigger, showing cascade connections and frequency-based sizing from corpus analysis of 5 session logs.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about meta-dates as the apex skill')
sendPrompt('Tell me about ghosts failure detection')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the NA pipeline skills')

svg.text: Numbers = mention count. Click any skill for details.

g.text: Cascade rule: meta-dates fires → phase activates → cluster skills auto-trigger
Dan triggers meta-dates only for emphasis. Crew activates everything else.
10 with template ideas to harvest: caveman, edit-article,
12 with minimal NEST value (conventional dev tools)
